heading: Share Diagrams
body:
You can [export](atlas-ui-data-modeling-export) your Atlas
entity-relationship diagram to collaborate with teams, receive feedback, and align on final schema
design decisions.

You can export your diagram as a:

- `.mdm` **Diagram File**.

- **PNG** image.

- **JSON** file.

You can also [import](atlas-ui-data-modeling-import) an `.mdm` file to
view or edit a diagram shared by another member of your cluster's project in
Atlas.
